name: Media Tagging Manager Jellyfin Plugin
description: TEST BUILD — tags selected Jellyfin media with streaming providers and TV networks. Not a stable release.
overview: TEST BUILD — provider and network tagging for selected Jellyfin libraries.

versions.changelog: 0.1.0.28-test adds Genres and Keywords Settings, direct TMDb Collections Tags review and application, expanded editable tag columns, Unknown Tag See Items, and corrected Main Settings logo saving. Test only; not a stable release.
